h
requirement for any other activity undertaken under
other SEBI regulations
Total Net worth for the FY
Profit After Tax for the FY
*********
433
Master Circular for Mutual Funds as on March 31, 2024

Development Fund

Companies (AMCs) of Mutual Funds

2023
